name: suraksha-weekly
description: AI Parametric Income Shield for Gig Delivery Partners - Guidewire DEVTrails 2026

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/web" "npm run dev -w apps/admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w apps/web && npm run lint -w apps/admin
scripts.type-check: npm run type-check -w apps/web && npm run type-check -w apps/admin
scripts.load:all: npm run load:baseline && npm run load:peak && npm run load:fraud
scripts.load:ci: npm run load:baseline && npm run load:fraud
